title: Soulified
description: In the world of Dark, mercy is a myth, and every shadow hides death. Git gud, or die trying
body:
# 🌑 SOULIFIED VANILLA

Souls-like difficulty for vanilla Minecraft. Every mob is tougher, faster, and deadlier.

---

## 📦 WHAT IT DOES

Transforms vanilla Minecraft mobs with permanent Dark Souls-inspired buffs applied at spawn:

---

## 📥 INSTALLATION

1. Place `soulified_vanilla` folder in `saves/[YourWorld]/datapacks/`
2. Run `/reload` in-game
3. Verify with `/datapack list` (should show in green)

---

## ⚙️ CUSTOMIZATION

Edit mob functions in `data/soulified/function/[mob_name].mcfunction`

Example - increase zombie strength:
```mcfunction
effect give @s minecraft:strength 99999 3  # Change level
```

Run `/reload` after editing.

---

## 🔧 COMPATIBILITY

⚠️ May conflict with other mob-modifying datapacks

⚠️ MAKE SURE all version match and if you are using datapacks use all datapacks and if you are using the mod versions use all mods. *EXAMPLE* Soulified DP or MOD 1.21.1 + Soulified Enderzoology DP or MOD 1.21.1 + Enderzoology MOD 1.21.1.

⚠️ Addons are ready I just need upload them (:

### Optional Addons (for modded)
- soulified_kobolds
- [soulified_enderzoology](https://modrinth.com/project/HzzmUNc7)
- [soulified_endermanoverhaul](https://modrinth.com/project/wrN5rj8W) 
- [soulified_creeperoverhaul](https://modrinth.com/project/DW8IDRg8)
- soulified_variantsandventures
- [soulified_eternalnether](https://modrinth.com/project/YIu4icku)
- soulified_tinyskeletons
- [soulified_illagerinvasion](https://modrinth.com/project/1Eizixou)

---

## 🐛 TROUBLESHOOTING

**Mobs not enhanced?** Run `/reload`
**Works on existing worlds?** Yes, only new mobs are affected
**Disable it?** `/datapack disable "file/soulified_vanilla"`

---

**Git gud or die trying! 💀**
